name: Hoftex Group AG
summary: Hoftex Group AG, through its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells textile products for various applications in Germany and internationally. The company operates through HOFTEX, NEUTEX, and TENOWO divisions. It offers traditional yarns and threads, and numerous specialized yarns; manufactures and markets decorative fabrics as yard goods, as well as ready-made household textiles; and engages in weaving, dyeing, finishing, supplying of decorative fabrics, interior sun protection solutions, and technical textiles solutions. The company also develops and manufactures acoustic nonwovens products for the automotive industry and nonwoven textiles for the construction industry, the cable industry, medical applications, and garment trade. The company was formerly known as Textilgruppe Hof AG and changed its name to Hoftex Group AG in January 2013. Hoftex Group AG was founded in 1853 and is headquartered in Hof, Germany.
